feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >"From the demented mind of Curry Barker, comes a new incel horror" >girl knocki…
entry.content: >"From the demented mind of Curry Barker, comes a new incel horror" >girl knocking at the door >"Anon! I'm here to netflix and chill!" >door creaks open as soon as she knocks on it >*bwaaaaah* - >She walks in and wanders around. > "Anon? You do make enough to afford a monthly netflix subscription right?" >*bwaaaaah* >she wanders into the living room and sees the tv. Netflix is replaced with something called 'plex' >girl is visibly trembling with disgust as she extends a hand to examine the geeky

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2876
entry.content: >A Match Made In Hell Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83570650 >Scripts to check image metadata

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Kde 6.7 yall. Isn’t it glorious? Fucking Linux devs need to be strung up and cru…
entry.content: Kde 6.7 yall. Isn’t it glorious? Fucking Linux devs need to be strung up and crucified roman style for being so fucking retarded. How can you be this bad at coding? The scourging of Jesus is too weak of a punishment. It’s on purpose at this point. By the way the system works perfectly. It’s a 9070xt and works perfectly fine on 6.6.5. There’s no excuse for it to be this fucking terrible.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /ACT/ - ANOTHER CAT THREAD?! #42
entry.content: >"Big Feline Milfs" Edition /ACT/ is a weekly Caturday thread dedicated to cats and other felines. Calling all artists and writers: Feel free to post your art, stories, and WIPs! Whether it's just doodles, smut art, or full-blown anthro stories/greentexts, all are welcome to share and critique. Let the Caturday festivities begin! Drop your favorite cat pics, comics, and game recs below! >Alpha Lexa Greens: https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/ folders/1Og2_VSZpZntiOqNK85_ANkFME- f77LsF?sort=13&dir

entry.title: /mu/ Music: 90s indie that isn't completely retarded & embarrassing unlike ween, pavement, d…
entry.content: 90s indie that isn't completely retarded & embarrassing unlike ween, pavement, dinosaur jr etc? i havent heard alot of rock post prog and i want to expand my taste. ive heard some stuff i want to hear more of but 95 percent of the albums ive sampled have this snarky slacker shtick thats unbearable. doesn't have to be super obscure, i haven't heard a ton of it.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Any Britfags here? It's a shame you guys don't appreciate them more. It's a quin…
entry.content: Any Britfags here? It's a shame you guys don't appreciate them more. It's a quintessential British band and it should be treasured by you, not pushed into obscurity. It's beyond me how Stones, The Who or even Oasis are more recognised at your place than a band that is basicallt a Platonic ideal of a british rock band . At least Ray is a Sir.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Just curious How viligant are the people managing ai like grok with illegal stuf…
entry.content: Just curious How viligant are the people managing ai like grok with illegal stuff? Like if you say you are a drug dealer nothing will happen probably. But if you post cocaine and explain that its your cocaine that you sell to people you will possibly get copped on? Are there any stories with this? I know chatgpt stopped a kid from committing suicide and suicide is a crime so they’re allowed to report that but im talking about drugs specifically.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: To the people still complaining about the lack of Adobe products on Linux: Your …
entry.content: To the people still complaining about the lack of Adobe products on Linux: Your use case is a niche, and after 20 years of listening to your drivel I'm tired of pretending it's not. Very few people are professionally involved in media creation to a degree where they absolutely *must* use these programs. Everyone else can get by with simpler alternatives, on the off chance they end up having to do so at all.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: "Ehh? You want a girlfriend? Really? That's so boyish!" "Yeah... I've been wanti…
entry.content: "Ehh? You want a girlfriend? Really? That's so boyish!" "Yeah... I've been wanting one for a while. It's been lonely." "What kind of girl do you like, anon-kun?" "Well... I think I like transgender girls best. In all honesty, I'd love a trans girlfriend." "NANI? A transgender girlfriend? Why not a real girl, like..." "Well, trans girls are just a lot prettier, I think. And they're smarter, too. But I'm mostly obsessed with their divine beauty."

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Navigating service manuals?
entry.content: I found a 2014 Subaru Outback service manual here: >https://sl-i.net/FORUM/showthread. php?18087-Subaru-Factory-Service-Ma nuals-(FSM)-Every-Model-USDM-EU It is 6314 pages! Even if you wanted to do the right thing and find torque specs and the proper procedure to do a task it would take hours to find the right section to just do one simple job like find the brake bleed order. How do people cope with the insane size of the service manuals that make finding info so difficult? I guess by ignoring t

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I spent my formative adolescent years dropped out of homeschool locked in a stor…
entry.content: I spent my formative adolescent years dropped out of homeschool locked in a storage room alone punching myself in the head, then after I turned 20 they ripped me out and put me in a female dominant mental institution for 2 years and burned that into the remainder of my neuroplasticity and traumatized and mind broke me, then sent me back to locked in a bedroom alone punching myself except now I have flashbacks The amygdala is cooked The sympathetic nervous system is locked My obsession with ganyu

Including allegations, he lied to Congress about gain-of-function research, influenced assessments on the origins of COVID-19, and "provided millions in U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund dang

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Merge correctly.
entry.content: Traffic is caused by assholes trying to skip the line and merging at the very end, causing cascading braking that travels down the line. You have plenty of warning that a merge is coming up, so move over as soon as you can. Don't come in here talking about some reddit faggotry like "muh zipper merge". Move over early and wait your turn like everyone else.

Since finding a girl here is basically impossible and prostitution is way too expensive, I'm heading to a country with better geomaxxing potential. Plus, in Southeast Asia it's much easier to get stronger pharmacy meds and drugs that are banned here or prescription-only. Anyway, Georgia is a wonderful country, and the best part is that the government services ar

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What's the use case for AI jailbreaking beyond wank material & making spaghetti …
entry.content: What's the use case for AI jailbreaking beyond wank material & making spaghetti code viruses? Not that I think AI should be locked down, but all other frowned upon/potentially prohibited uses it's genuinely bad at anyway. It fucking sucks at chemistry for example and things like learning how to launder money are pretty easy to find through conventional means. Am I missing something or does the whole scene start and end with coomers and script kiddies?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I live in a shithole where fuel is expensive and wages are low. I did the math a…
entry.content: I live in a shithole where fuel is expensive and wages are low. I did the math and comparing fuel prices + purchasing power, 1us gallong of gasoline comes out to about $20usd where I live. So what would you buy if gas was $20 a gallon and you had a budget of about 30kusd? i dont wanna drive a cuckcar but buying a v8 truck is financial suicide here

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I need some advice /mu/. When I was younger, I made a lot of music that was sold…
entry.content: I need some advice /mu/. When I was younger, I made a lot of music that was sold on and re-record by some famous musicians. I also did remixes for people and videos too. I’ve been in and out of hospital for 10 years and didn’t have the chance to chase up on the money I would’ve got for it until recently. It turns out I had a trust fund setup and it was switched to an ISA on my 18th birthday but it wasn’t me that did this, and it would’ve needed to be me that changed and not the account proprieto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: fucker is eating half my RAM
entry.content: I’ve literally got one single tab open in my browser and the fucker is eating half my RAM. How much RAM is yours using? Can you send a screenshot and suggest a fix? And don’t give me that ‘unused RAM is wasted RAM’ bullshit, because I can’t even launch Ratchet & Clank due to lack of memory. And don’t even start with Linux.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why are these games so freakishly boring?
entry.content: Something about them just gives me the iiiiiccckkkkkkk > is it the bad level design? > is it the repetitive bullet spongey gameplay? > is it the nagging dialogue and the EXTREMELY overrated, unfunny characters (ie handsome jack, ellie, lillith, etc etc etc) > is it the atrocious vehicle controls? ... > IS IT RANDY PITCHFORD?!

entry.content: >Molly Tuttle, a major label artist with multiple Grammys, constant radio and late night show exposure, and a massive IRL ad campaign, still can’t get 200k views on her latest album’s lead single a year after release Is mainstream media completely dead?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I genuinely do not get it. Why would the US care that a bunch of Japanese people…
entry.content: I genuinely do not get it. Why would the US care that a bunch of Japanese people threw together some outdated battleship? How is that a secret that would undo the post-WW2 world order? In reality America would probably be impressed.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Just apply everything you know today to the present since it's so important. Thi…
entry.content: Just apply everything you know today to the present since it's so important. This kind of thinking doesn't even make sense because everything you know today is the result of everything you didn't know back then, so wanting to change the past is just an idea that you shouldn't have gone through everything you went through, which is foolish. Forgive yourself and accept that things were as they were. Every second you spend thinking about it is a valuable second that you stop spending on something m
